candidates.name: API Error Message Search Engine
candidates.pitch: Right-click any error message in console, searches Stack Overflow, GitHub issues, and vendor docs, returns ranked solutions with upvote counts. Context-aware filtering by framework. Replaces manual se
candidates.pain: Developers copy-paste cryptic error messages into Google and sift through stale Stack Overflow links to find solutions.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.pain: Sales reps spend 15+ minutes researching prospects manually when mutual connections or shared interests could be found automatically.

candidates.name: JWT Token Structure Inspector
candidates.pitch: Detects JWTs in network requests and localStorage, decodes header/payload/signature, highlights expired tokens and missing claims. Adds an overlay icon when JWT is present. Quick win tool for any auth
candidates.pain: Developers debugging auth issues waste time decoding JWTs manually when a quick visual breakdown would instantly show claims, expiry, and errors.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Lead Company Funding Event Monitor
candidates.pitch: Monitors SEC filings, Crunchbase, and news APIs for funding announcements, alerts when a prospect raises money. Per-seat pricing for CRM integration. High intent signal that sales teams actively seek.
candidates.pain: Sales teams miss timing their outreach to funding events, losing the moment when prospects have budget and urgency.

candidates.name: Gong Call Filler Word Coach

candidates.pain: Sales reps have no idea how often they say um, like, and basically during calls, missing easy coaching opportunities.

candidates.pain: Sales teams miss employee sentiment changes at competitors that signal hiring freezes, morale issues, or departures worth exploiting.

candidates.pain: Engineers waste money on on-demand resources when reserved capacity would cut cloud bills by 30% but tracking coverage is manual.

candidates.pain: Teams miss when webhook providers silently change payload schemas, causing silent failures in production.

candidates.name: Design Token Diffusion Tracker
candidates.pitch: Scans DOM for CSS custom properties, maps them to design token names, shows adoption percentage across components. Highlights outdated hardcoded values. Dashboard view for design system health. Niche
candidates.pain: Design systems teams lose track of which components adopt new tokens, creating visual inconsistency that goes undetected until user complaints.

candidates.name: PR Description Completion Scorer
candidates.pitch: GitHub PR listener that analyzes description length, presence of what/why/testing sections, linked tickets, and screenshots. Scores 0-100 with specific improvement suggestions. Integrates as a PR chec
candidates.pain: Code reviewers waste time on PRs with vague descriptions, often requesting clarification that could be avoided if completeness were scored upfront.

candidates.name: Sales Deck Reading Pace Advisor
candidates.pitch: Uses screen share analysis to detect slide change frequency, estimates reading pace, shows a subtle speedometer overlay. Presenter can glance at it to self-regulate. Novel angle on sales coaching.
candidates.pain: Sales reps often present too fast in meetings, but have no real-time feedback to slow down and land key points.
